title: Toddlers among more than 50 schoolchildren kidnapped in Nigeria
content: No group has yet claimed responsibility for the attacks, which have devastated Mussa town in Borno state.

title: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say

title: New outbreak of Ebola kills 80 in eastern DR Congo
content: Africa's top health agency says around 246 cases have been reported - a case has also been reported in Uganda.

content: Pressure mounts on Starmer's government, as Labour rivals including recently resigned Wes Streeting circle.

content: Heavy ship traffic and rising regional tensions over one of the world’s most critical energy routes.

title: Sudanese army captures key town near Ethiopian border from RSF
content: Sudan’s army says it retook a vital town in southeastern Blue Nile state and inflicted heavy losses on the RSF.

title: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
content: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.

originalTitle: Resilient Celtic time run perfectly to win race after eight-month chase
title: Resilient Celtic time run perfectly to win race after eight-month chase
content: Celtic chased Hearts for eight months, 32 games, 2,880 on-field minutes and 48 hours. In the season's dying embers, they caught them.

originalTitle: 'Celtic gave me reasons to live' - but O'Neill unsure about staying on
title: 'Celtic gave me reasons to live' - but O'Neill unsure about staying on
content: Martin O'Neill says Celtic have given him "reasons to live" after their stunning Scottish Premiership triumph, but the 74-year-old insists he does not know whether he will stay on beyond this season.

originalTitle: Liverpool must return to heavy metal football - Salah
title: Liverpool must return to heavy metal football - Salah
content: Mohamed Salah says Liverpool must return to being a "heavy metal attacking team that opponents fear" after trophyless season.
